general_textarena_slm_policy.name: general_textarena_slm_policy
general_textarena_slm_policy.value:
Follow the visible TextArena rules. Track state across observations, avoid repeating invalid actions, and output only one legal action.

Learned rules:
- Before answering, copy the exact action format from the current game instructions; if a previous action failed or made no progress, choose a different legal action.

iteratedprisonersdilemma_slm_policy.name: iteratedprisonersdilemma_slm_policy
iteratedprisonersdilemma_slm_policy.value: For IteratedPrisonersDilemma-v0: Prefer cooperation unless the opponent defects repeatedly; use the exact decision token when asked.

kuhnpoker_short_slm_policy.name: kuhnpoker_short_slm_policy
kuhnpoker_short_slm_policy.value: For KuhnPoker-v0-short: Use conservative Kuhn poker strategy: bet strong cards, check weak cards, call selectively.

simplenegotiation_short_slm_policy.name: simplenegotiation_short_slm_policy
simplenegotiation_short_slm_policy.value: For SimpleNegotiation-v0-short: Make mutually beneficial offers using the required offer token format.
